feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒆 - 𝑖𝑚𝑝𝑙𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑡𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦, 𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑛𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,236Chapters: 25/28Kudos: 617

Summary: 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑒𝑠 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑡𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑑, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑡𝑟𝑖𝑐𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦 𝑠𝑜. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑡𝑟𝑢𝑡ℎ 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑎𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑓𝑎𝑐𝑡 𝑎𝑏𝑜𝑢𝑡 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘’𝑠 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑟𝑒 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑐𝑖𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝑠𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑚𝑜𝑟𝑒 𝑎𝑛𝑑 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑛𝑜 𝑟𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡𝑜 𝑝𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑚 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑢𝑛𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑙𝑙 𝑓𝑖𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑤𝑎𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑢𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑡'𝑠 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑒. 𝑆𝑜 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑐𝑎𝑛 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑒 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑝𝑒𝑜𝑝𝑙𝑒 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑛𝑜𝑤, ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑎𝑛 ℎ𝑎𝑣𝑒 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑤𝑜𝑛'𝑡 𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝐼𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑛𝑑, 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑙𝑤𝑎𝑦𝑠 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑜𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝑂𝑟 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 ℎ𝑎𝑠 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑔𝑎𝑖𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑡𝑖𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 - 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑'𝑠 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑠.

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,028Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 210

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: Leave the Door Open
entry.summary:
Author: aastranova

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,145Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 503

Summary: Eddie Diaz is a single father just trying to settle into a new house with his son, Christopher. Evan Buckley lives next door, working at his sister’s café and minding his own life…until the day Christopher trips in the driveway.

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,641Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 134

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,439Chapters: 11/24Kudos: 354

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: your beautiful eyes (stare right into mine)
entry.summary:
Author: lyingdetectives

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,542Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 66

Summary: Eddie is close to whining when he gets a spark of an idea. Eddie tilts his head down, and stares up at Buck in a way that he knows makes his eyes look bigger and more pleading. He juts his bottom lip out a little in a slight pout. This has secretly become his move when he is in a debate with Buck as a sure fire way to win. Eddie is already internally celebrating his win, and thinking about going back to bed with Buck, when Buck yelps and jumps a few steps backwards away from him. His hands fly up to his face, and he blocks his eyes. “No! I know what you’re doing!” Buck protests, shaking his head wildly OR Buck has figured out that Eddie uses his eyes to win arguments, but he really wants to win this one.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: That was a date?
entry.summary:
Author: Rhir0se

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,603Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 43

Summary: “I’m so glad you said yes this time,” Eddie said, holding Buck close. “I thought since you never actively avoided me after last time that you didn’t hate me or anything. But I was worried it’d mess up our friendship. But look at us now! We’re in love.”“Woah woah woah what do you mean last time. We’ve never kissed before; pretty sure I would remember that.”“No, we didn’t kiss. I’m talking about our date.”“What date? We’ve never been on a date. Pretty sure I’d remember that too.”“Yeah, it was a few years ago now and I took you on a date to that poker place. Remember you had you’re lightning math powers and we used them to crush everyone else. And then nothing came of it, and I figured you weren’t interested.”“That was a date?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 199,295Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 104

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,208Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 34

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: it all breaks down, it always does (it all works out, it always does)
entry.summary:
Author: Elgney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,229Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 787

Summary: “I have no idea what’s going on.” He was embarrassed at the whiny note in his voice, but he couldn’t swallow it away. “I mean, the last thing I remember, I was telling my parents that I was leaving Texas. And then all of the sudden I wake up and it’s like—” Like some stranger named Buck had infiltrated every corner of his life. That’s what it felt like. —— Amnesiac Eddie tries really hard to hate Buck. It doesn’t stick.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Mirror Image
entry.summary:
Author: brainwormsoop

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,619Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 121

Summary: “Okay, we need a game plan.” Eddie slaps his palms down on the table harshly, causing Chim to drop his fork again. “You take Maddie, I take Buck, and we figure out a way to make sure neither of them get into any stupid fights.” Hen raises an eyebrow. “You’re going to dinner with the Buckleys?” Eddie nods. “Of course I am, Buck asked me to.” Well, Buck had suggested it would be easier if Eddie were there and Eddie had all but leapt at the opportunity. “I’m not going to leave him to do this alone.” “We’ll be there!” Chimney chimes in. Eddie waves a hand dismissively. “You know what I mean.” “Do we?” Hen asks incredulously and Eddie shoots her a glare. “Look, Buck already cleared it with Maddie. They’re a united front, and you and I need to be one too.” Or, five times Buck and Eddie are compared to another couple, and one time they comparison gets... a little too real.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Bachelorette
entry.summary:
Author: cebbage

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,011Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: He started drawing small circles on the corner of the page, pressing down and letting up intermittently. The pattern was of no relevance to him, nor was the poem he’d sought to write. It was a ridiculous idea from the jump. The ink melted as the page got damp. When would Eddie get back from having a life? When would he get one back? When he did, if he did, who would he be?

entry.title: nothing burns like past mistakes

Author: ellewriteswrongs

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,049Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 120

Summary: the found family has been incredible this season, but it hasn't always been that way. and sometimes all it takes is for everyone to realize how low the bar was before, is a kid that assumes the best about his family --- aka: chris assumes that the firefam showed up for his dad the way they're all showing up for buck

entry.title: the art of floriography
entry.summary:
Author: radiantbuck

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,944Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 156

Summary: buck starts receiving flowers. one bouquet, left carefully at his door, with a small card explaining exactly what it means. then another the next day. and another. each one different but just as deliberate as the last. it’s probably nothing (or a language of love and flowers)

entry.title: ARE WE STILL FRIENDS?
entry.summary:
Author: Ramsey_Writes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,388Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: “What about us, okay?” The words burst out before he could stop them. Buck looked back at him, his eyes bright with unshed tears. “What about me?” Eddie froze. It felt like the oxygen had been sucked out of the room. There it was—the truth they’d been dancing around since the day the U-Haul was packed. OR Buck finally tells Eddie what it felt like to be left behind when he moved to El Paso.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I love you, I'm sorry
entry.summary:
Author: DAFT_03

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,116Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Set in the aftermath of 'Mother’s Boy' - a re-imagination of Buck’s storyline in episodes ‘DIY’ and ‘Pick Your Poison’ based on fan theories I heard on TikTok before the episodes came out. Bobby is unfortunately dead but for the sole purpose of giving Buck more pain and trauma as clearly Tim Minear hates him. This is what Buck's drug addiction storyline could have been if it didn't have to be watered down for TV. Didn't hate how they did the story just heard loads of really good theories on TikTok before the episodes came out which made them feel slightly underwhelming. Basically Buck accidentally OD's at home one evening and makes the worst choices he possibly could to help the situation and has no one.
